description: IELTS Part 1高频词。包括flat/apartment/house等类型。
examples_json: [{"en":"I live in a comfortable flat.","zh":"我住在一个舒适的公寓里。"}]

description: 描述家居环境的常用词。比comfortable更口语化。
examples_json: [{"en":"My room is small but cozy.","zh":"我的房间小但舒适。"}]

description: 居住的社区。描述周边环境时常用。
examples_json: [{"en":"It's a quiet neighborhood with nice cafes.","zh":"这是一个安静的社区，有不错的咖啡馆。"}]

description: IELTS Part 1必问题目。描述你长大的地方。
examples_json: [{"en":"My hometown is a small city in southern China.","zh":"我的家乡是中国南部的一个小城市。"}]

description: 描述家乡风景的常用形容词。scenic spot = 景点。
examples_json: [{"en":"My hometown has many scenic spots.","zh":"我家乡有很多风景优美的地方。"}]

description: 适合居住的。IELTS描述城市/家乡的常用词。
examples_json: [{"en":"It's a livable city with a relaxed pace of life.","zh":"这是一个宜居的城市，生活节奏慢。"}]

description: 大学主修专业。IELTS常见问题: What's your major?
examples_json: [{"en":"My major is Computer Science.","zh":"我的专业是计算机科学。"}]

description: 职业生涯。IELTS常讨论career plan/goal。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm building a career in marketing.","zh":"我在市场营销领域发展职业。"}]

description: 学生的作业或工作任务。
examples_json: [{"en":"I spend about 20 hours per week on assignments.","zh":"我每周花大约20小时做作业。"}]

description: 业余爱好。IELTS常问: Do you have any hobbies?
examples_json: [{"en":"My main hobby is photography.","zh":"我的主要爱好是摄影。"}]

description: 休闲/空闲时间。leisure time/leisure activity。
examples_json: [{"en":"In my leisure time, I like to read.","zh":"空闲时我喜欢阅读。"}]

description: 描述爱好或活动让人放松。
examples_json: [{"en":"I find painting very relaxing.","zh":"我觉得画画很放松。"}]

description: P2 cue card常见动词。recommend...to visitors。
examples_json: [{"en":"I would highly recommend this place to visitors.","zh":"我强烈推荐这个地方给游客。"}]

description: 描述景色/建筑的褒义词。IELTS高分词汇。
examples_json: [{"en":"The view from the mountain was magnificent.","zh":"山上的景色壮丽无比。"}]

description: 形容景色美到令人屏息。比beautiful更高级。
examples_json: [{"en":"The sunrise was absolutely breathtaking.","zh":"日出令人叹为观止。"}]

description: 描述地点氛围。vibrant/relaxed atmosphere。
examples_json: [{"en":"The café has a really cozy atmosphere.","zh":"这家咖啡馆氛围很舒适。"}]

description: 形容城市或区域有活力。IELTS P2描述地点常用词。
examples_json: [{"en":"The area is vibrant and full of street art.","zh":"这个区域充满活力，到处都是街头艺术。"}]

description: 场馆设施。sports facilities / training facilities。
examples_json: [{"en":"The stadium has world-class facilities.","zh":"这个体育场有世界一流的设施。"}]

description: 现场观看比赛的观众。spectator sport = 观赏性运动。
examples_json: [{"en":"Thousands of spectators filled the stadium.","zh":"成千上万的观众挤满了体育场。"}]

description: 描述商店主营什么。specialize in organic products。
examples_json: [{"en":"The shop specializes in organic food.","zh":"这家店专营有机食品。"}]

description: 商店服务质量。excellent/poor customer service。
examples_json: [{"en":"They offer excellent customer service.","zh":"他们提供优质的客户服务。"}]

description: 旅游业/旅游。IELTS常讨论tourism的利弊。
examples_json: [{"en":"Tourism has brought many benefits to the city.","zh":"旅游业给这个城市带来了很多好处。"}]

description: 城市的基础设施。包括交通、网络、水电等。
examples_json: [{"en":"The city needs to improve its infrastructure.","zh":"这个城市需要改善基础设施。"}]

description: 保护(文化/环境)。preserve cultural heritage。
examples_json: [{"en":"We should preserve historical buildings while developing tourism.","zh":"我们在发展旅游的同时应该保护历史建筑。"}]

description: 科技/技术。IELTS高频话题。
examples_json: [{"en":"Technology has changed the way we communicate.","zh":"科技改变了我们的沟通方式。"}]

description: 数字的/数码的。digital age/device。
examples_json: [{"en":"We live in the digital age.","zh":"我们生活在数字时代。"}]

description: 高效的。描述科技提高效率。反义词: inefficient。
examples_json: [{"en":"Technology makes our work more efficient.","zh":"科技让我们的工作更高效。"}]

description: 职业发展方向。IELTS常讨论career choice/path。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm still figuring out my career path.","zh":"我还在想我的职业发展道路。"}]

description: IELTS Part 3高频话题词。
examples_json: [{"en":"Maintaining a good work-life balance is important.","zh":"保持良好的工作生活平衡很重要。"}]

description: 形容工作让人有成就感。fulfilling career/job。
examples_json: [{"en":"I find my job very fulfilling.","zh":"我觉得我的工作很有成就感。"}]

description: 教育方法/学习方式。learning approach。
examples_json: [{"en":"The school uses a new approach to teaching.","zh":"这所学校采用新的教学方法。"}]

description: 自学/在线学习需要self-discipline。IELTS常讨论。
examples_json: [{"en":"Online learning requires a lot of self-discipline.","zh":"在线学习需要很强的自律性。"}]

description: 互动的。interactive learning/teaching method。
examples_json: [{"en":"Interactive classes are more engaging.","zh":"互动式课堂更有吸引力。"}]
